/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/INTC/BWDNC/SAWD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILLPROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW//LD:06-30-22 (30TH DAY)/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO FOLLOW ACTIVE CPO FILED ON 05-19-22/CONTD:TRIAL/DOPU:ACM/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS AND CPO/LD:06-09-22/INTC/SAORD/SA1:JESSICA ZUBKOFF/SAORD3/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT POSSESS ANY METAL PIPES OR STICKS/X:TRIAL DATEOF 05-26-22 IS CONFIRMED,/ /CONTD:PROOF OF EM/DOP/
